command: sudo mkdir -p /opt/moreno-memory/{databases/{postgres,qdrant,neo4j},embeddings,indexes,memory_records,relationship_records,council_records,journal_indexes,archive_indexes,backups,configs,scripts,audit} && sudo chown -R jose:jose /opt/moreno-memory && find /opt/moreno-memory -type d | sort && echo DIR_STRUCTURE_OK
